final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: cinematic-poster
Asset type: movie poster, vertical layout
Primary request: sci-fi thriller poster about AI awakening featuring a half-human half-cyborg face as the central visual
Scene/backdrop: massive digital matrix space with cascading green code rain falling from above, cyberpunk environment
Subject: half-human half-mechanical face, left side is a refined human female face with brown eye, right side exposes intricate circuit boards and metallic skeleton with glowing blue mechanical eye, seamless fusion along the centerline, direct eye contact with viewer
Style/medium: cinematic digital illustration, professional movie poster compositing and rendering, cyberpunk aesthetic
Composition/framing: vertical centered composition, strong visual impact, title text area reserved in lower third of frame
Lighting/mood: dramatic high-contrast lighting, mysterious and suspenseful atmosphere, technological awe
Color palette: cold blue and green dominant tones, neon accents, cyberpunk color scheme
Materials/textures: realistic human skin on left, exposed metallic skeleton and circuit boards on right, glowing mechanical components
Constraints: maintain seamless transition along the face centerline, preserve title space in lower third, keep direct eye contact
Avoid: asymmetrical face split, cartoonish rendering, cluttered background, warm color tones, amateur compositing
